gaps.description: M1: Hardware detector, profiles, Ollama auto-install, HTTP API, Web UI, one-click install — all implemented and verified
M2: STT/TTS integration with 8 voice adapters, push-to-talk UI, wake word pipeline — all implemented
M3: WebSocket device hub, device tools, admin panel — all implemented
M3: Visual perception — sense.js wraps AgenticSense via adapter; agentic-sense installed but underlying MediaPipe detection requires browser runtime, limiting server-side vision capability
M4: Cloud fallback (Ollama-first-then-cloud), config hot-update, Docker deployment, documentation — all implemented
M101: Engine registry unification — brain/stt/tts all route through registry, dead files cleaned, duplicate routes removed
M102: OpenAI-compatible API full coverage — /v1/chat/completions, /v1/embeddings, /v1/audio/transcriptions, /v1/audio/speech, /v1/models all implemented with proper streaming and format compliance
Vision: Hardware-adaptive model selection functional through profiles.js + matcher.js + config.js chain
M103: Health check endpoint, OpenAI error format with code field, audio format validation — all implemented
Vision: No auth/rate-limiting middleware — acceptable for local-first architecture but limits multi-user or exposed deployments
Vision: No request queue or retry/backoff logic — cloud fallback exists but failed requests are not retried or queued
